"user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41398", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}], "description": "## Summary
Before OpenClaw 2026.4.2, the iOS A2UI bridge treated generic local-network pages as trusted bridge origins. A page loaded from a local-network or tailnet host could trigger agent.request dispatch without the stricter trusted-canvas origin check.

## Impact
A loaded attacker-controlled page could inject unauthorized non-owner agent.request runs into the active iOS node session, polluting session state and consuming budget. The demonstrated impact did not include owner-only actions or arbitrary host execution.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: openclaw (npm)
- Affected versions: <= 2026.4.1
- Patched versions: >= 2026.4.2
- Latest published npm version: 2026.4.1

## Fix Commit(s)
49d08382a90f71dabe2877b3f6729ad85f808d57 — restrict A2UI action dispatch to trusted canvas URLs

## Release Process Note
The fix is present on main and is staged for OpenClaw 2026.4.2. Publish this advisory after the 2026.4.2 npm release is live.

Thanks [@nexrin](https://github.com/nexrin) for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00112, "percentile": 0.01633}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4p4f-fc8q-84m3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-07T18:15:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4p4f-fc8q-84m3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4p4f-fc8q-84m3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41398"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-07T18:15:03Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-4p4f-fc8q-84m3", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/49d08382a90f71dabe2877b3f6729ad85f808d57", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4p4f-fc8q-84m3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-4p4f-fc8q-84m3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: iOS A2UI bridge trusted generic local-network pages for agent.request dispatch", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-28T18:22:09Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4p4f-fc8q-84m3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: iOS A2UI bridge trusted generic local-network pages for agent.request dispatch
